title: 6PCS Star Balloons, 22Inch Huge Hot Pink Red Pink Explosion Star Balloon Foil Spike Cone Balloons for Girls Women Birthday Bridal Shower Valentine's Day Party Decorations
features: Red Blue White Star Balloons: You will get 6pcs 22-inch one-piece 12-pointed Star Explosion balloons, including 2pcs red, 2pcs blue, and 2pcs white Star Explosion balloons. The red, blue, and white color scheme, along with the unique star-shaped balloons, make for a fun patriotic party.

Premium Quality Star Balloons: The 4th of July star balloons are made of high-quality aluminum foil, durable and odorless. They hold air for a long time and will keep your party decorations sparkling!

Independence Day Party Decorations: Our 6-pack of red blue and white star balloons are perfect for July 4th parties. Not only 4th of July parties, but everyday birthday parties, bachelorette parties, baby showers, anniversaries, graduations and more can add flair to your party.

Easy to Use Star Balloons: The one-piece design makes these red, blue, and white star balloons convenient to use. No assembly is required; simply inflate the balloon, and it will self-seal. You can string them up with a line for decoration or stick them on the wall with glue to enhance your party scene.

Tips for Using Star Balloons: Do not overfill the balloons. Avoid exposure to sunlight, overheating, sharp objects, or excessive friction. The star balloons are self-sealing and will last for weeks with normal use.
description: Product Description Elevate Your Celebration Elegant colorful star balloons for birthday anniversary festival Christmas party decorations. Durable & Reusable High-quality aluminum foil ensure your decorations stay fabulous for longer. Effortless Decor Simply inflate and hang for an eye-catching display that will impress your guests!
